Once again, you find yourself in a castle setting where the team must work together to complete trials and collect gold for a common prize pool. However, there is a traitor hiding among you, who is secretly carrying out his own tasks and in the shadows of the night may eliminate one of the innocent. Players try to uncover the traitor during the round table ritual, and then the final round is a decisive battle for the prize pool. Whether you share it or try to get it all for yourself is up to you. The supplementary set is designed for 4-6 players aged 12 years and older and requires the basic game to play.
